_comment: Hand-authored fixture: 10 profiler-event dicts mirroring the shape that build_sync_bound_events() produces (5 CUDA kernels + 5 CPU aten::item sync calls), in the dict shape that _function_event_to_portable_dict emits. Wired into tests/test_torch_source.py: convert_function_events(this list) -> engine Events -> attribute() -> diagnose() must yield Verdict.SYNC_BOUND. That proves the torch path lands at the same engine seam as the mock + file paths. Kernel dur (8000us) clears avg_kernel_dur>=50us guard; 5 kernels clears warmup_trace_guard; aten::item ending exactly at idle-start makes sync_fraction=1.0 which clears the >=0.25 threshold.
